---

title: "D04_03: R120 Metadata Enrichment (CBZ)"
subtitle: "Enrich Poisson analysis outputs with variable range metadata"
parent: "D04_poisson_marketing"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D04_03"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2025-12-30"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D04_02_poisson_analysis"
outputs_to:
  - "processed_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_{product_line}"
implements:
  - script: "cbz_D04_03.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/cbz/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D04_03: R120 Metadata Enrichment (CBZ) {#overview}

This task enriches CBZ Poisson analysis tables with **R120 variable range
metadata**, enabling correct interpretation of dummy variables and numeric
predictor ranges.

## Implementation Scripts

| Platform | Script | Location | Output |
|----------|--------|----------|--------|
| Cyberbiz | `cbz_D04_03.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/cbz/` | `processed_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_{product_line}` |

## Inputs

- `processed_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_{product_line}` (per-product-line Poisson results)
- `app_data.df_cbz_sales_complete_time_series` (source values for range checks)

## Outputs

- `processed_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_{product_line}` (R120-enriched)

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
ENRICH processed_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_{product_line}
WITH r120_metadata FROM app_data.df_cbz_sales_complete_time_series
OUTPUT TO processed_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_{product_line}
```

## R120 Fields Added

- `predictor_min`
- `predictor_max`
- `predictor_range`
- `predictor_is_binary`
- `track_multiplier`
- `r120_enrichment_method`

## Notes

- CBZ-only; no EBY or ALL implementation.
- This step preserves MP029 (no fake data) by deriving ranges from actual
  source tables.
- Execution order: this step runs **after** D04_02 outputs exist.

## Next Task

Proceed to [D04_01: Time Label Enrichment](D04_01_time_label_enrichment.qmd) if
label enrichment is required for UI display.
